hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services

introduction.title: Agreement to Terms
introduction.content: By accessing and using Shikshanam's platform and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

terms.definition: Shikshanam's educational platform, website, mobile applications, and related services
Any individual who accesses or uses our Service
All educational materials, videos, text, images, and other materials available through our Service
Your personal account created to access our Service

acceptance.subtitle: By using our Service, you agree to these terms

requirements.description: You must be at least 13 years old to use our Service. Users under 18 must have parental consent.

requirements.description: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account

requirements.description: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password

prohibited.description: Harassing, threatening, or abusing other users or our staff

terms.description: You agree to pay all fees associated with your use of our Service

terms.description: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase if you are not satisfied with our Service

terms.description: Fees are charged in advance and are non-refundable except as specified in our refund policy

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your personal information
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using our Service, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

termination.title: Termination
termination.subtitle: When and how this agreement can be terminated

circumstances.description: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us or using the account deletion feature

circumstances.description: We may terminate or suspend your account if you violate these terms or for other reasons at our discretion

circumstances.description: Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately

disclaimers.description: Our Service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind

disclaimers.description: We do not guarantee that our Service will be available at all times

disclaimers.description: While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee the accuracy of all educational content

limitation.subtitle: Our liability is limited as permitted by law
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Shikshanam shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our Service.

governing.subtitle: These terms are governed by Indian law
governing.content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these terms will be resolved in the courts of India.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.subtitle: We may update these terms from time to time
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or through our platform. Continued use of our Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.subtitle: Questions about these terms? Contact us
